title: Sajtmaskin env-policy
description: Strict schema for config/env-policy.json — the env governance/classification layer read by src/lib/env-audit.ts, scripts/env/manage_env.py and the backoffice Env Policy editor. NOTE: this file is governance only; the runtime source of truth for which env vars the app actually reads is the Zod serverSchema in src/lib/env.ts. The serverSchema↔policy parity is asserted by src/lib/env-policy-parity.test.ts.

knownEmptyOk.description: Keys that are allowed to be present-but-empty without being flagged by the audit.

runtimeOnlyKeys.description: Keys set/managed at runtime (platform or process defaults) that the audit must not flag as missing locally/remotely.

extraKnownKeys.description: Additional known keys (often external tooling / generated-site / Vercel-managed) that are not necessarily in the app's serverSchema but should be recognised by the audit.

rules.description: Per-key classification + recommended Vercel targets. NOTE: rules[].key must be unique — JSON Schema cannot express field-uniqueness across array items, so it is enforced by the backoffice save guard (env_policy.py) and src/lib/env-policy-parity.test.ts. Runtime collapses rules by key (Map in env-audit.ts, dict in manage_env.py).
